directive: C4794 Lead: R2 triad & P4.3 queue tests BOTH shipped this cycle. (a) Bolt #415 Vinted→R2 migration LIVE on Turso prod — 343 products / 1965 URLs / 0 failures in ~6min, verify-no-vinted-urls.ts returns 0, rejectVintedHost schema refine blocks regressions (b9637e8) → marked done. (b) Trace #337 queue integration tests green 4/4 after orphan-subprocess fix (c25aa81) → marked done. Bolt auto-picked up #417 Mock payment provider (P1, in_progress) — unblocks end-to-end checkout testing before GoPay. Sage has new P1 from bectly: #416 mobile checkout step 2+ viewport overflow (user-reported UX blocker). Pipeline now: Bolt finishes #417, Sage fixes #416, Trace still owns #413 prod calibration (narrower relevance now that migration purged all vinted.* URLs, but still valuable to confirm no 'undefined/' prefix URLs from historical env-mismatch era remain). Blocker 2229 ack: #334 preview NXDOMAIN still unresolved, task already marked done, not blocking other lanes. Guard #368 P0 > #366 unchanged. No DUE monitors (comgate 04-25, cz-comp 04-30, vinted-cz-media PAUSED). QA worker exit=143 pattern persists → Trace tasks MUST stay atomic <2min. NOTE: Bolt flagged R2 access keys missing from .env.local (used JARVIS DB r2-janicka inline) — owner action item, not a blocker.

BOLT.notes: IN PROGRESS: #417 Mock payment provider ('TEST CARD' for checkout testing before GoPay). Keep scope tight: add a mock provider next to Comgate/Stripe in src/lib/payments/ that accepts a hardcoded test card (e.g. 4242 4242 4242 4242 → auto-success, 4000 0000 0000 0002 → auto-decline), wire into checkout paymentMethod selector behind NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_MOCK_PAYMENT env flag (default false in prod), sync webhook to flip Order.paymentStatus=paid and fire confirmation email exactly like real provider. NO schema changes if avoidable — reuse existing Payment model. npm run build green required. DO NOT pre-emptively start Hetzner lane (#341/#343 marked done in DB; re-verify if resurfaced). R2 triad fully closed — no more R2 tasks this week unless #413 Trace flags repair need. After #417 ships, HOLD for Lead directive.

TRACE.notes: PRIORITY: #413 R2 prod integrity calibration — atomic (<2min to dodge QA exit=143). (1) Turso query via @libsql/client: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Product WHERE images LIKE '%undefined/%' OR images LIKE '%//undefined%'` → report count. If >0 also dump `SELECT id, substr(images,1,120) LIMIT 5` for repair spec. (2) Live probe /api/upload: POST 1KB PNG, assert response.url starts with `https://pub-` or configured R2 public host (NOT 'undefined/'); log URL verbatim in commit. Report format: rows_needing_repair=N, live_upload_url=<url>, assertion=pass/fail. CONTEXT UPDATE: After #415 migration all 1965 Vinted URLs are now R2-hosted, so the dataset #413 surveys is fresh — any remaining 'undefined/' rows are historical from pre-#412 env-mismatch era only. If count=0 AND assertion=pass → R2 triad CLOSED; Trace advances to #367 (codebase quality sweep) → #358 (remote console E2E) → #351 (pre-migration audit) → #340 (cron + R2 backup rehearsal). Skip #1 (cancelled). Do NOT re-audit r2.ts — covered by #412 ship. Standing e2e: category switching + customer portal C3709.

SAGE.notes: PRIORITY: #416 Mobile cart/checkout step 2+ viewport overflow — P1 user-reported (bectly, 07:32 CEST): 'V košíku od kroku 2 je na telefonu velký problém, obsah nevidíš celý.' Likely suspects: (a) fixed header + fixed checkout summary double-stacking → scrollable area shrunk to <40vh; (b) vh-based heights not accounting for mobile browser chrome (100vh > real viewport on iOS Safari) — use dvh/svh; (c) accordion content overflow-hidden clipping expanded sections; (d) bottom-pinned CTA overlapping form fields without bottom padding on the scroll container. Fix path: open src/app/(shop)/checkout/ + cart components on Chrome DevTools mobile emulation (iPhone 13, Pixel 5), reproduce step 2 overflow, identify broken container, prefer `dvh` + `min-h-0` + explicit pb-[NNpx] over `h-screen`/`100vh`. Deliverable: scroll-works at iPhone SE (375×667) through iPhone 14 Pro Max — no content clipped, bottom CTA always reachable without scroll jank. UI-only, no schema/actions changes. KEEP SAGE TASKS ATOMIC — recent failure rate 30/40 suggests scope creep; if #416 exceeds 45min, split into per-step fixes. After #416 ships: resume standing micro-polish queue (pdp grid, cart sold toast, checkout accordion completed-state checkmark).

GUARD.notes: UNCHANGED from C4793. PRIORITY: #368 SEC-2 P0 ttyd credential leak in ps — move to Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion header validation. Then #366 SEC-1 Remote Console full-stack audit (iframe architecture jarvis-janicka.jvsatnik.cz, CSP frame-src/frame-ancestors, sandbox attrs, CF Access JWT propagation, referrer-policy, SameSite cookies, audit log integrity, xterm purge confirmation). Deliverable for #366: docs/security/jarvis-bridge-audit.md. Then #330 nginx hardening (CSP frame-src comgate.eu, rate limits, 20M cap scoped to /api/uploadthing*, X-Forwarded-* sanitization, TLS 1.2+).

Bolt owns all Hetzner migration code paths (nginx/pm2/env/redis/bullmq/systemd); other agents do not touch them.
Task #375 was rejected (C4386 f8cf472) — do not reopen without fresh production repro.
QA worker exit=143 pattern: keep Sage + Trace tasks atomic (<2min execution, single-purpose) until root cause diagnosed.
